prestazioni: Forged aluminum 7.6L twin-turbocharged V8 (HPE1000T engine code) with billet crankshaft, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons, upgraded to 1,817 hp via twin Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbochargers with titanium-aluminide turbine wheels, custom 4.5-inch diameter downpipes, and a bespoke Hennessey-developed ECU calibration utilizing Motec M150 engine management with dual Bosch Motorsport 82mm throttle bodies and a dry-sump oiling system featuring a Peterson Fluid Systems 8-stage pump

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović with 4.5-inch diameter inconel headers, 3D-printed titanium mufflers, and electronically controlled bypass valves for active sound modulation, paired with a custom carbon fiber X-pipe resonator tuned for 1,200 Hz frequency harmonics to optimize backpressure and turbo spool

Öhlins TTX46 coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping, 24-position rebound, and 18-position compression settings, paired with a Hennessey-specific carbon fiber anti-roll bar kit (28mm front, 22mm rear) and spherical bearing end links from SuperPro, alongside a hydraulic lift system for front axle clearance
estetica: Full carbon fiber body kit by Hennessey Design Studio, including a 3D-scanned and wind-tunnel-optimized front splitter with integrated active aero flaps (adjustable via MoTeC PDM30), a rear diffuser with Gurney flaps, and a removable hardtop with electrochromic glass (SageGlass) for adaptive tinting

Custom 22-inch forged aluminum wheels by HRE (FF16 model) with center-locking hubs, 20x12.5 front and 21x13.5 rear dimensions, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (345/25 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear) with nitrogen inflation and TPMS sensors calibrated for 35 psi cold pressure

Interior rework featuring full Alcantara-wrapped Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point Schroth Racing harnesses, a custom carbon fiber steering wheel by Dymag with integrated MoTeC C127 dash display, and a bespoke audio system by Focal Utopia with 12x 100mm Beryllium tweeters and a 2,400W amplifier tuned for 120dB output at 1kHz
